hook.text: UNITED HAVE SECRET PLAN B AFTER SUMMERVILLE BLOW

beats.text: SUMMERVILLE BLOCKED — KRETINSKY REFUSES TO LET HIM LEAVE
BUT ROMANO REVEALS TERMS ALREADY AGREED WITH CARLOS BALEBA
THE BRIGHTON MIDFIELDER WANTS TO JOIN UNITED THIS SUMMER
ONLY A FEE WITH BRIGHTON NOW STANDS IN THE WAY

caption: West Ham slammed the door on Summerville — but United already have a Plan B waiting 🔴 With Daniel Kretinsky blocking Crysencio Summerville's sale, Fabrizio Romano has revealed that Manchester United already have personal terms AGREED with Brighton's Carlos Baleba. The verbal agreement from last summer remains valid for 2026, and the 22-year-old Cameroonian wants the move. Described as 'better than Moises Caicedo', Baleba is the contingency plan INEOS have been quietly holding. The only hurdle now is agreeing a fee with Brighton. Would Baleba be a good signing? 👇 REPORTED — per Fabrizio Romano / GiveMeSport. #mufc #manutd #premierleague #football #transfernews #transferwindow
